grammar_note: du = existential, turns statement to question

english: The book is on the table.
I am sitting in the house.
I am hungry but there is no food.
newari_devanagari: जि क्षुधाय् दु तर खाजा मदु।
newari_transliteration: Ji kshudhay du tara khaja madu.

english: I didn't go because it rained.
If you come, I will be happy.
Do you want tea or water?
It rained, so I stayed home.
When I was young, I danced.
The man who came is my father.
The book that I read was good.
The place where she lives is beautiful.
The school is near the temple.
The Newar community lives in Kathmandu Valley.
newari_devanagari: नेवार समुदाय येँ उपत्यकाय् थाःगु दु।
newari_transliteration: Newar samuday yen upatyakay thahgu du.
